headline: Constellation Energy’s Crane Loan Highlights Nuclear Role In AI Power Demand
summary: US Department of Energy approves a US$1b loan for Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) to restart the Crane nuclear plant. Restarted facility is expected to add meaningful carbon free generation capacity to support growing electricity needs. Loan approval arrives as AI data centers and other digital infrastructure drive heavier power demand in key US regions. For investors watching how power grids adjust to AI related demand, Constellation Energy sits at an important intersection of nuclear,...
